run.name: Test loongarch64

head_commit.message:
Address review feedback on the OSTD logging API

- Use `::core::sync` in `*_once!` macros to avoid name-resolution
  ambiguity when a local `core` module is in scope.
- Optimize the `RateLimitState` fast path: store `window_end` instead
  of `window_start`, work in raw jiffies (compile-time constant) to
  avoid `as_duration().as_millis()` divisions, and push all atomic
  read-modify-write operations into a `#[cold]` slow path so the
  reject path uses only two relaxed loads.
- Remove the redundant `max_level().is_enabled()` check from the log
  crate bridge's `log()` method (already filtered by `enabled()` and
  synchronized via `set_max_level`).
- Reword the `Log` trait doc to say console flushing is "best-effort"
  instead of "may block", resolving the contradiction with the
  "works in all contexts" guideline.
- Order attributes alphabetically (`#[derive]` before `#[repr]`).
- Wrap the `LevelFilter::from_u8` doc comment for consistency.

run.display_title: Replace the log crate with OSTD's own logging API
